overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a sunlit coastal urban plaza with palm trees and roller coaster structures, transitioning through covered market walkways and dark indoor spaces, concluding with an item pickup and exit back to the coastal overlook.

events.description: begins walking forward past the large green utility truck
passing the large truck which temporarily blocks the left side view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past a large green utility truck in a sunlit coastal plaza

notable_agents.action: large green utility truck parked on the left side of the plaza

large metal roller coaster framework visible behind the buildings
tall futuristic glass skyscraper in the distance
covered bus stop with graffiti and advertisements
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit coastal plaza with a large green utility truck parked on the left. The camera walks forward past the truck, revealing palm trees, a distant roller coaster structure, and modern glass towers. Red and white concrete barriers line the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with graffiti-covered ground

events.description: passing from the truck area into the open plaza with colorful graffiti on the ground
approaching the entrance to a covered walkway with concrete pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza observing colorful graffiti on the concrete ground

notable_agents.action: red abandoned car parked near the barriers with doors open

entered.detail: concrete ground covered with colorful spray paint graffiti
red derelict vehicle parked near the walkway barriers
scattered plastic chairs and tables near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, the ground is covered in vibrant graffiti. A red abandoned car sits on the right near striped barriers, while plastic chairs and tables are scattered on the left. The camera approaches a covered walkway entrance lined with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food stalls

events.description: entering the covered walkway with large concrete support pillars
passing a motionless body on the ground near the food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway with scattered plastic chairs and food stalls

notable_agents.action: motionless body lying face down on the ground near the walkway entrance

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete support pillars for the overhead structure
market stall with watermelons and produce displayed on tables
multi-story brutalist concrete building with large windows ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered walkway with massive concrete pillars. A body lies motionless on the ground to the left. The camera passes a food stall with watermelons on the right and approaches a large concrete building ahead, moving from bright sunlight into mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark indoor commercial space with service counter

events.description: entering dark indoor area from bright outdoor, significant light drop
picking up the Neon Shocker item from the counter

agents.ego_description: entering a dark indoor space and collecting an item from a service counter

entered.detail: long dark service counter with items and boxes on top
large illuminated poster reading WILD FUN ALL NIGHT with neon graphics
stacked cardboard boxes on the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit indoor space with a service counter. A glowing poster on the left wall reads WILD FUN ALL NIGHT. The player approaches the counter and picks up an item at 48 seconds, then continues through the dark corridor toward windows showing the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with city skyline view

events.description: exiting the dark building back to bright outdoor coastal plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor corridor and exiting back to the bright coastal overlook

entered.detail: panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and coastal cityscape
open view of the ocean and coastline beyond the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through the final indoor corridor, the camera exits the building back into bright sunlight. The scene opens to a stunning coastal overlook with futuristic skyscrapers visible across the water. Palm trees frame the view as the camera walks out onto the open plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright coastal plaza that gradually narrows as it approaches a covered urban walkway. It begins by moving past a large green utility truck, revealing a vista of palm trees, modern glass towers, and a distant roller coaster structure under a clear sun. As the camera advances, the open landscape shifts toward a more cluttered urban environment where red and white concrete barriers line the path. The scene then transitions across ground covered in vibrant graffiti, passing a red abandoned car and scattered plastic furniture before finally drawing closer to the shaded entrance of a palm-lined walkway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit urban walkway through a dim interior and back out to a bright coastal vista. It begins by passing under massive concrete pillars in a semi-covered walkway, gliding past a motionless body and a food stall filled with watermelons as the light shifts from bright sun to shadow. The camera then enters a dimly lit indoor space, passing a glowing WILD FUN ALL NIGHT poster before approaching a service counter to pick up an item. As the movement continues through a dark corridor, the scene shifts toward distant windows that signal the exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the building back into brilliant sunlight, opening onto a stunning coastal overlook framed by palm trees with futuristic skyscrapers rising across the water.
